rules.rule_text:
title: Darkgate
id: 325202bc-69b8-11ee-8c99-0242ac120002
description: Detects Darkgate downloading its payload
status: test
author: NTT Security - Amata Anantaprayoon
date: '2023-10-13'
modified: '2023-10-13'
references:
- https://malpedia.caad.fkie.fraunhofer.de/details/win.darkgate
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    dest_port: 2351
    cs-method: GET
    c-uri|startswith: /msi
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Highly unlikely
level: high
tags:
- attack.execution
